hypothesis: If a GraphSAGE model uses frozen, pre-trained single-gas FNN embeddings combined with gas fractions as node features to model Ar/O2 mixtures, then it will predict 10-point radial etching rates with lower weighted MSE (higher R²) than FNN, GCN, or GAT baselines on both Testgrid and Testthresh splits because transferring single-gas representations enables accurate composition-dependent interaction modeling and extrapolation across unseen power/pressure and composition regimes.
